ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the intervention */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group classification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of intervention */,
  "brief" TEXT /* Brief description of the intervention */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the intervention */,
  "alcohol" TEXT /* Level of alcohol focus */,
  "tobacco" TEXT /* Level of tobacco focus */,
  "cannabis" TEXT /* Level of cannabis focus */,
  "other" TEXT /* Level of focus on other substances */,
  "alcohol_use" TEXT /* Usage level of alcohol */,
  "alcohol_behavior" TEXT /* Behavioral aspects related to alcohol */,
  "alcohol_harm" TEXT /* Harm associated with alcohol */,
  "tobacco_use" TEXT /* Usage level of tobacco */,
  "tobacco_behavior" TEXT /* Behavioral aspects related to tobacco */,
  "tobacco_quit" TEXT /* Efforts to quit tobacco */,
  "cannabis_use" TEXT /* Usage level of cannabis */,
  "cannabis_behavior" TEXT /* Behavioral aspects related to cannabis */,
  "support" TEXT /* Level of support provided */,
  "mixed" TEXT /* Mixed substance use focus */,
  "none" TEXT /* None substance use focus */,
  "norfolk" TEXT /* Norfolk specific focus */,
  "location_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention ended */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants involved in the intervention */,
  "organizer_id" TEXT /* ID of the organizer or lead person */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the intervention */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_cannabis FOREIGN KEY ("cannabis") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_other FOREIGN KEY ("other") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_tobacco FOREIGN KEY ("tobacco") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_alcohol FOREIGN KEY ("alcohol") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_group FOREIGN KEY ("group") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group's focus */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type of intervention */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of interventions of this type in days */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Average cost of interventions of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substances" (
  "substance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the substance */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the substance */,
  "health_risks" TEXT /* Detailed health risks associated with the substance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_levels" (
  "usage_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each usage level */,
  "usage_name" TEXT /* Name of the usage level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the usage level */,
  "recommended_intervention" TEXT /* Recommended interventions for this usage level */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Prevalence of this usage level in the target population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behaviors" (
  "behavior_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each behavior */,
  "behavior_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior */,
  "intervention_strategies" TEXT /* Strategies to address the behavior */,
  "common_indicators" TEXT /* Common indicators or signs of the behavior */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "harms" (
  "harm_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each harm */,
  "harm_name" TEXT /* Name of the harm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the harm */,
  "intervention_strategies" TEXT /* Strategies to mitigate the harm */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the harm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("harm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supports" (
  "support_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each support */,
  "support_name" TEXT /* Name of the support */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the support */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "focus_areas" (
  "focus_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each focus area */,
  "focus_name" TEXT /* Name of the focus area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the focus area */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Specific population targeted by the focus area */,
  "additional_resources" TEXT /* Additional resources or tools available for the focus area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("focus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the region */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "intervention_id" TEXT /* ID of the intervention */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome observed */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "observed_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was observed */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Overall impact of the outcome */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the outcome data */,
  "measured_by" TEXT /* Person or entity that measured the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_outcomes_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "intervention_id" TEXT /* ID of the intervention being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the intervention data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
